arts.ttl: I galvanised Manchester United's season - now I am plotting their downfall
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy was in charge of United the last time they played Leicester in the Premier League. HIs new club could further damage Ruben Amorim's season

arts.ttl: I scored a scorpion kick for Manchester United - and clashed with Jose Mourinho over breakfast
arts.sum: There were high hopes for Henrikh Mkhitaryan when he signed for Man United but he never lived up to his billing.

arts.ttl: Manchester United transfer latest: Club's Kobbie Mainoo plan as Ruben Amorim prepares for busy summer
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly hatch a plan for midfield sensation Kobbie Mainoo as negotiations over a new contract continue to drag on.

arts.ttl: 'I've always felt supported' - Amorim on Ratcliffe
arts.sum: Manchester United coach Ruben Amorim says he has always felt supported by the club's co-owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe and also gives thoughts on the club's new stadium plans.

arts.ttl: Supercomputer predicts 2024/25 Europa League winner as Man Utd & Tottenham advance
arts.sum: Every remaining club's chances of winning the 2024/25 Europa League, including Man Utd and Tottenham.

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Bruno Fernandes reveals dressing room reaction as Chelsea swoop for transfer
arts.sum: Manchester United’s season is still just about alive after reaching the Europa League quarter-finals and they will be aiming to make it back to back wins this weekend against Leicester

arts.ttl: Mason Greenwood told 'the ball is in his court' over Manchester United reunion
arts.sum: Mason Greenwood has been intending to play for Jamaica - now under ex-Manchester United No.2 Steve McClaren - but there have been growing questions with the Jamaican Football Federation still to receive the required documents it needs

arts.ttl: Man Utd's Plan B and C: Two wonderkids pursued after transfer humiliation
arts.sum: Manchester United are pursuing Roger Fernandes and Tyler Dibling after missing out on Geovany Quenda . The 17-year-old had been Man Utd's top target for the right wing-back position.

arts.ttl: Mason Greenwood Man United reunion set as talks confirmed - 'I am very confident'
arts.sum: Marseille head coach Roberto De Zerbi dropped Mason Greenwood last weekend after claiming the former Manchester United player was "too inconsistent" and "training badly"
